---
title: "SpatialBasis"
date: "2026-03-22"
description: "A statistical downscaling package for spatial data in R"
listing:
  - id: project-posts
    contents: "posts/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
---

Landing page for the SpatialBasis project. More coming soon.

## Posts

::: {#project-posts}
:::
